description: Groups current registered passenger cars into tailpipe CO2 bands. Use for under-100 or over-200 g/km questions. Excludes EVs and cars without valid CO2 values.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer IS NOT NULL AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 1000 | EVAL co2_tier = CASE(_co2_g_per_km_primaer < 100, "Under 100 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 130, "100-129 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 160, "130-159 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 200, "160-199 g/km", "200+ g/km") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY co2_tier | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 8
